easy-does-it.opentdb.39e77df462e20698.explanation: John Brown's 1859 raid targeted the federal armory at Harpers Ferry, then part of Virginia.
easy-does-it.opentdb.39e77df462e20698.details: Brown hoped captured weapons would help launch a wider uprising against slavery. The raid failed, but it intensified national conflict over slavery shortly before the Civil War.

easy-does-it.opentdb.3899396f304d9690.explanation: Sherlock Holmes concludes that whatever remains must be the truth once the impossible has been eliminated.
easy-does-it.opentdb.3899396f304d9690.details: The line captures Holmes's method of testing possibilities against evidence. It is one of the character's best-known statements about deductive reasoning.

easy-does-it.opentdb.f83ff1219e86ff8e.explanation: Chef and television personality Guy Fieri hosts Guy's Grocery Games.
easy-does-it.opentdb.f83ff1219e86ff8e.details: The Food Network competition challenges chefs to cook while navigating unusual shopping restrictions inside a supermarket-style set.

easy-does-it.opentdb.64faa6d441a0d465.explanation: Cerberus is traditionally depicted with three heads.
easy-does-it.opentdb.64faa6d441a0d465.details: In Greek mythology, the monstrous dog guards the entrance to the underworld and prevents the dead from escaping.

easy-does-it.opentdb.d0c625e67ff72cb0.explanation: ALF's birth name is Gordon Shumway.
easy-does-it.opentdb.d0c625e67ff72cb0.details: The nickname ALF means “Alien Life Form.” He comes from the planet Melmac and hides with the Tanner family in the television sitcom.

easy-does-it.opentdb.ef66e20f740c6692.explanation: A golf score two strokes under par on one hole is an eagle.
easy-does-it.opentdb.ef66e20f740c6692.details: The neighboring scoring terms form a useful sequence: birdie is one under par, eagle is two under, and albatross is three under.

easy-does-it.opentdb.7dcd13363b49df12.explanation: Figaro is the title barber in Rossini's The Barber of Seville.
easy-does-it.opentdb.7dcd13363b49df12.details: Figaro is a clever fixer who helps Count Almaviva pursue Rosina. The character also appears in Mozart's opera The Marriage of Figaro.

easy-does-it.opentdb.156aeec902055d73.explanation: Germany defeated Brazil 7–1 in their 2014 World Cup semifinal.
easy-does-it.opentdb.156aeec902055d73.details: Germany scored five times in the opening 29 minutes in Belo Horizonte. The historic defeat is often called the Mineirazo, after the Mineirão stadium.

easy-does-it.opentdb.0521f2041805faa5.explanation: Captain James T. Kirk's middle name is Tiberius.
easy-does-it.opentdb.0521f2041805faa5.details: The full name James Tiberius Kirk became a durable part of Star Trek canon and is commonly shortened to the initials James T. Kirk.

easy-does-it.opentdb.c208bd4a3fd41826.explanation: The kākāpō is native to New Zealand.
easy-does-it.opentdb.c208bd4a3fd41826.details: It is a large, nocturnal, flightless parrot found nowhere else. Intensive conservation work protects the critically endangered species from introduced predators.

easy-does-it.opentdb.0773d22d29701c69.explanation: Nike takes its name from the Greek goddess of victory.
easy-does-it.opentdb.0773d22d29701c69.details: The mythological name suits an athletic brand built around competition and achievement. Nike is often portrayed with wings, symbolizing swift victory.

easy-does-it.opentdb.3b9df37bbde6ad9b.explanation: Diamond is a crystalline form of carbon.
easy-does-it.opentdb.3b9df37bbde6ad9b.details: Its exceptional hardness comes from carbon atoms bonded in a rigid three-dimensional lattice. Natural diamonds generally form under high pressure deep within Earth's mantle.

easy-does-it.opentdb.7cb14e3723da4947.explanation: The dwarf planet Eris is named for the Greek goddess of discord.
easy-does-it.opentdb.7cb14e3723da4947.details: Eris's discovery revealed an object comparable to Pluto and helped force astronomers to define the term planet, leading to Pluto's 2006 reclassification.

easy-does-it.opentdb.dccbb84411f85182.explanation: Don McLean's American Pie calls the 1959 plane crash “the day the music died.”
easy-does-it.opentdb.dccbb84411f85182.details: The crash killed Buddy Holly, Ritchie Valens, and J. P. “The Big Bopper” Richardson. McLean released the song in 1971.

easy-does-it.opentdb.9bf9f8ba7aa2f6b5.explanation: A female common blackbird is primarily brown rather than black.
easy-does-it.opentdb.9bf9f8ba7aa2f6b5.details: The species shows sexual dimorphism: adult males are glossy black with a bright yellow-orange bill, while females have subtler brown plumage.

easy-does-it.opentdb.9800e24197aa3b47.explanation: A baby bat is called a pup.
easy-does-it.opentdb.9800e24197aa3b47.details: The same term is used for the young of several mammals, including dogs and seals. Most bats give birth to only one pup at a time.

easy-does-it.opentdb.3eb4e0fa6f61faee.details: DNA stores hereditary information using sequences of four chemical bases. Its familiar double-helix structure consists of two complementary strands.

easy-does-it.opentdb.fa5cd74d905c6f22.explanation: The S in NASA stands for Space.
easy-does-it.opentdb.fa5cd74d905c6f22.details: The full name is the National Aeronautics and Space Administration. “Aeronautics” covers flight within Earth's atmosphere, while “Space” covers activity beyond it.

easy-does-it.opentdb.ba8c10a3960a3637.explanation: Independence Day commemorates the Declaration of Independence and the colonies' break from Britain.
easy-does-it.opentdb.ba8c10a3960a3637.details: Congress adopted the Declaration on July 4, 1776. Although the holiday is often described as celebrating its signing, most delegates signed the engrossed document later.

easy-does-it.opentdb.7d180f804ef859cb.explanation: Dabbing is a dance gesture in which the head drops toward one bent elbow while the other arm extends.
easy-does-it.opentdb.7d180f804ef859cb.details: The move spread from hip-hop culture into sports celebrations and internet culture during the mid-2010s.

easy-does-it.opentdb.f6e8c06f24125ebb.explanation: Prince Edward Island is Canada's smallest province by both land area and population.
easy-does-it.opentdb.f6e8c06f24125ebb.details: The island province lies in the Gulf of St. Lawrence. Its capital is Charlottetown, where meetings that helped lead to Canadian Confederation were held.

easy-does-it.opentdb.75d8133b4c9ae5ff.explanation: The cat known online as Grumpy Cat was named Tardar Sauce.
easy-does-it.opentdb.75d8133b4c9ae5ff.details: Her permanently grumpy-looking expression resulted from feline dwarfism and an underbite. A photograph posted in 2012 turned her into an internet celebrity.

easy-does-it.opentdb.450e34a2807a09ad.explanation: Laos is a country in mainland Southeast Asia.
easy-does-it.opentdb.450e34a2807a09ad.details: It is landlocked and bordered by China, Vietnam, Cambodia, Thailand, and Myanmar. Its capital is Vientiane.

easy-does-it.opentdb.425276a0efdd7799.explanation: Edinburgh is the capital of Scotland.
easy-does-it.opentdb.425276a0efdd7799.details: The city is home to the Scottish Parliament and Edinburgh Castle. Glasgow is Scotland's largest city, but it is not the capital.

easy-does-it.opentdb.b92d89bacc347924.explanation: Albany is the capital of New York State.
easy-does-it.opentdb.b92d89bacc347924.details: New York City is far larger and more famous, making it a common distractor. Albany became the permanent state capital in 1797.

easy-does-it.opentdb.b17397bdc8dbac32.explanation: The blue whale is the largest animal known to have lived on Earth.
easy-does-it.opentdb.b17397bdc8dbac32.details: Adults can exceed 30 metres in length and weigh well over 100 metric tons. Despite their size, they feed mainly on tiny krill.

easy-does-it.opentdb.1ca147c97d9db6b8.explanation: Modern humans belong to the species Homo sapiens.
easy-does-it.opentdb.1ca147c97d9db6b8.details: The Latin name is commonly translated as “wise human.” Homo is the genus, while sapiens identifies the species.

easy-does-it.opentdb.aa31640d14d53150.explanation: Harpies are mythological creatures depicted with women's faces and birds' bodies.
easy-does-it.opentdb.aa31640d14d53150.details: In Greek mythology they are associated with violent winds and divine punishment. Later art often emphasizes their vulture-like form.

easy-does-it.opentdb.8da6364216e3afe8.explanation: Dr. No was the first James Bond feature film in the long-running Eon Productions series.
easy-does-it.opentdb.8da6364216e3afe8.details: Released in 1962, it introduced Sean Connery as Bond. It was adapted from Ian Fleming's novel of the same name.

easy-does-it.opentdb.f2960042928e33d2.explanation: The Silk Road is the collective name for ancient trade routes linking East Asia with the Mediterranean world.
easy-does-it.opentdb.f2960042928e33d2.details: It was a network rather than a single road. Traders carried goods such as silk and spices while religions, technologies, and ideas also moved between regions.

easy-does-it.opentdb.04ca3fe5fd5e94bb.explanation: Melissa Joan Hart played teenage witch Sabrina Spellman.
easy-does-it.opentdb.04ca3fe5fd5e94bb.details: In Sabrina the Teenage Witch, Sabrina lives with her aunts Hilda and Zelda while learning to manage her magical powers.

easy-does-it.opentdb.18eb986bb73d8c7a.explanation: Ax and Smash formed the professional wrestling tag team Demolition.
easy-does-it.opentdb.18eb986bb73d8c7a.details: Known for face paint and studded leather outfits, Demolition became a dominant WWF team during the late 1980s.

easy-does-it.opentdb.ff8f9066877d3fdb.details: The year appears in the club's full name and its common abbreviation, making “04” a built-in memory clue. The club is based in Gelsenkirchen, Germany.

easy-does-it.opentdb.a0d87d8f291c7710.explanation: The action film Con Air was released in 1997.
easy-does-it.opentdb.a0d87d8f291c7710.details: Nicolas Cage stars as Cameron Poe aboard a prisoner-transport aircraft seized by inmates. The film was part of a run of major 1990s action roles for Cage.

easy-does-it.opentdb.a160dea133c90099.explanation: Fe is the chemical symbol for iron.
easy-does-it.opentdb.a160dea133c90099.details: The symbol comes from ferrum, the Latin word for iron. Iron has atomic number 26 and is the principal metal in steel.

easy-does-it.opentdb.b65a4c26a02790ae.explanation: Orpheus journeyed into the underworld in an attempt to bring back his wife, Eurydice.
easy-does-it.opentdb.b65a4c26a02790ae.details: His music persuaded Hades to release her on the condition that Orpheus not look back until they escaped. He looked back too soon and lost her again.

easy-does-it.opentdb.40b3e9b4b2121249.explanation: German field marshal Erwin Rommel was nicknamed the Desert Fox.
easy-does-it.opentdb.40b3e9b4b2121249.details: The nickname reflects his reputation for mobile tactics while commanding Axis forces in North Africa during World War II.

easy-does-it.opentdb.5e7163fbe5bb3855.explanation: Ancient Phrygia occupied territory in what is now central-western Turkey.
easy-does-it.opentdb.5e7163fbe5bb3855.details: The kingdom is strongly associated with the legendary King Midas. Its most famous capital was Gordion.

easy-does-it.opentdb.ce252b3ea1bfc2f9.explanation: No country owns all of Antarctica, although seven countries maintain territorial claims.
easy-does-it.opentdb.ce252b3ea1bfc2f9.details: The Antarctic Treaty preserves the continent for peaceful scientific activity and effectively sets sovereignty disputes aside while the treaty remains in force.

easy-does-it.opentdb.8cf71644fa8b5973.explanation: Platelets gather at damaged blood vessels and help form the initial plug that limits bleeding.
easy-does-it.opentdb.8cf71644fa8b5973.details: They work with clotting proteins to stabilize the plug with fibrin. Platelets are cell fragments rather than complete blood cells.

easy-does-it.opentdb.de708c7c0f4f5a20.explanation: Horse riding is not one of the three standard triathlon disciplines.
easy-does-it.opentdb.de708c7c0f4f5a20.details: A conventional triathlon combines swimming, cycling, and running in that order. Equestrian events appear in the modern pentathlon instead.

easy-does-it.opentdb.f164cbc8b878f45a.explanation: Eleven is the Stranger Things character with telekinetic abilities.
easy-does-it.opentdb.f164cbc8b878f45a.details: Played by Millie Bobby Brown, Eleven escaped from Hawkins National Laboratory, where experiments helped shape her extraordinary powers.

easy-does-it.opentdb.d05cd7f970e9f6f3.explanation: Justin Bieber provides the featured vocals on Jack Ü's Where Are Ü Now.
easy-does-it.opentdb.d05cd7f970e9f6f3.details: Jack Ü was the collaboration between producers Skrillex and Diplo. The 2015 single helped mark a more electronic direction in Bieber's music.

easy-does-it.opentdb.1b5a34c3e5f02757.explanation: Benjamin Franklin appears on the United States $100 bill.
easy-does-it.opentdb.1b5a34c3e5f02757.details: Franklin was a Founding Father, diplomat, printer, and scientist, but never a U.S. president—an important distinction from most people pictured on commonly used notes.

easy-does-it.opentdb.92148e8a998fab6b.explanation: Marty McFly is the central protagonist of Back to the Future.
easy-does-it.opentdb.92148e8a998fab6b.details: Michael J. Fox plays the teenager who travels from 1985 to 1955 in Doc Brown's DeLorean time machine.

easy-does-it.opentdb.c01d026d8e1b31fc.explanation: David Duchovny played FBI agent Fox Mulder on The X-Files.
easy-does-it.opentdb.c01d026d8e1b31fc.details: Mulder investigates paranormal cases and is the more openly believing partner to Dana Scully's scientific skeptic.

easy-does-it.opentdb.f3e3740813e63d27.explanation: Milla Jovovich plays Alice in the Resident Evil film series.
easy-does-it.opentdb.f3e3740813e63d27.details: Alice was created for the films rather than adapted directly from the video games. She becomes the central fighter against the Umbrella Corporation and its biological weapons.

easy-does-it.opentdb.5a0194fbb8fae3be.explanation: Nico Rosberg won the 2016 Formula One World Drivers' Championship.
easy-does-it.opentdb.5a0194fbb8fae3be.details: Rosberg narrowly defeated Mercedes teammate Lewis Hamilton for the title and announced his retirement only days later.

easy-does-it.opentdb.58cf990c0b5915a3.details: Prince first wrote the song for his side project the Family. Sinéad O'Connor's emotionally intense 1990 recording became the best-known version.

easy-does-it.opentdb.668f81343318c1cf.explanation: Back in Black and Ballbreaker are albums by AC/DC.
easy-does-it.opentdb.668f81343318c1cf.details: Back in Black was released in 1980 as the band's first album with singer Brian Johnson. Ballbreaker followed in 1995.
